models.description: The fastest Claude model with near-frontier intelligence, optimized for speed and efficiency with strong reasoning capabilities.
The most intelligent Claude model, designed for building agents and complex coding tasks with exceptional reasoning and long-context handling.
The best combination of speed and intelligence, offering rapid responses with competitive reasoning and coding capabilities.
May 2025 snapshot of Claude Opus 4, a highly capable model designed for complex reasoning and agentic tasks.
May 2025 snapshot of Claude Sonnet 4, offering a strong balance of speed and intelligence for production workloads.
August 2025 snapshot of Claude Opus 4.1, an incremental update with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.

Versioned snapshot of Claude Haiku 4.5 from October 2025, optimized for speed and efficiency with near-frontier intelligence.
November 2025 snapshot of Claude Opus 4.5, offering advanced reasoning and long-context capabilities for complex tasks.
[DEPRECATED June 2026] Fast and efficient multimodal model with 1M token context window, optimized for high-frequency tasks with vision and audio support.

Lightweight Gemini 3.1 Flash preview optimized for cost-effective deployments with updated capabilities.
Gemini 3.1 Pro preview with enhanced multimodal reasoning, coding, and instruction-following at frontier performance.

Mistral's most capable general-purpose model with 256K context, offering state-of-the-art multimodal reasoning and instruction following.
Code-specialized Mistral model optimized for software engineering tasks including code generation, debugging, and technical documentation.
March 2026 release of Mistral Small 4, a highly efficient hybrid model unifying instruction following, reasoning, and coding capabilities.
Ultra-compact 3B parameter Ministral 3 model for edge and on-device deployments with best-in-class efficiency.

Snapshot of GPT-3.5 from March 2023, with 4K context window for text completion and chat tasks.

OpenAI flagship model excelling at coding, reasoning, and agentic tasks with configurable reasoning effort and 400K context.
Near-frontier intelligence at lower cost, optimized for high-volume workloads with precise instruction following and 400K context.
OpenAI flagship model with configurable reasoning effort (none/low/medium/high), designed for coding and agentic tasks.
Specialized GPT-5.1 variant for agentic coding tasks in Codex environments, available exclusively via Responses API.
Frontier model for complex professional work excelling in agentic, coding, and professional workflows with 1M context and variable reasoning.
